beat1.headline: Music na the thing wey dey bring strangers together since
beat1.subtext3: Across languages wey you never speak before
beat2.text: The beat dey cross every border. The words never fit do am.
beat3.text: E no be like that again.
beat4.prefix: For the first time wey commercial dance track go do this thing
beat4.headline: One track. 50 languages. 5.8 billion voices.
